stemHtml:
When conducting simulated evacuation drills, which are correct? (Choose 4 out of 6)

1. Curtains must be in the take-off position
2. Seat belt and harnesses must be worn
3. Aircraft over 44 seats must be evacuated in 180 seconds
4. Aircraft attitude must be stable and landing gear extended
5. Cabin baggage must be stowed in overhead lockers and the aisles kept clear for safety reasons
6. All cabin crew are sat at their stations, awaiting the signal to start the evacuation
